title: oxalis campicola
intro: Oxalis campicola, also known as the rock wood-sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood-sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat digestive issues and urinary tract infections due to its high concentration of oxalic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Oxalis campicola include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune system function. Oxalis campicola can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
